key.name: show-hostname
key.summary: Show computer name in the panel label
key.description: When enabled, the panel label appends the local hostname after the account name.

key.name: show-username
key.summary: Show username in the panel label
key.description: When enabled, the top bar shows the account name next to the avatar and optional hostname.

key.name: show-avatar
key.summary: Show avatar in the top bar
key.description: When enabled, the top bar shows the user avatar before the account name.

key.name: keep-awake
key.description: When enabled, the extension inhibits session idle so the screen saver does not activate.

key.name: place-after-navigation
key.description: When enabled, the panel item is placed after the Apps and Places menus if they are loaded.

key.name: show-topbar
key.summary: Show the extension in the top bar
key.description: When disabled, the quick settings menu entry remains available but the panel item is hidden.

key.name: show-quick-settings
key.summary: Show the extension in the quick settings menu
key.description: When disabled, the right-side quick settings toggle is hidden.

key.name: quick-settings-toggle-topbar-only
key.summary: Quick settings click toggles only the top bar item
key.description: When enabled, clicking the username tile in quick settings only shows or hides the top bar item. When disabled, clicking the tile disables the whole extension instead.

key.name: hide-topbar-fullscreen
key.summary: Hide the top bar while an app is fullscreen
key.description: When enabled, the GNOME top bar is hidden whenever the focused window is fullscreen.

key.name: hide-topbar-fullscreen-all-monitors
key.summary: Apply fullscreen autohide on all monitors
key.description: When enabled, a focused fullscreen window on any monitor can hide the GNOME top bar. When disabled, fullscreen autohide only applies to the primary monitor.

key.name: hide-topbar-maximized
key.summary: Hide the top bar while the focused app is maximized
key.description: When enabled, the GNOME top bar is hidden whenever the focused window is maximized.

key.name: hide-topbar-touching
key.summary: Hide the top bar while the focused app touches the top edge
key.description: When enabled, the GNOME top bar is hidden whenever the focused window reaches the top edge of the screen.
